visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with glasses and a grey cap stands in a brightly lit indoor hallway with a patterned carpet. He holds a black smartphone box labeled 'X300 Pro'. Behind him, a large window reveals an urban landscape. He is gesturing towards the box. (2) He opens the box and pulls out a white smartphone wrapped in translucent protective film. He holds it with both hands, showing the device to the camera. A person in black is visible in the background. (3) The man peels a long white protective sticker off the back of the phone. The back of the phone is light gold or silver with a massive circular camera module. He moves the phone closer to the camera. (4) He places the phone aside and opens the internal compartments of the box, revealing a white power adapter, a USB cable, and a circular phone case. He points at each item. (5) A close-up shot focuses on the back of the smartphone, emphasizing the large 'ZEISS' branded circular camera lens and the 'vivo' logo. The phone is held by a hand. (6) The man demonstrates a black telephoto lens attachment. He places his index finger next to it to show its length. The device is mounted on a camera-grip style phone case. (7) A screen recording of the camera app shows the man zooming in on a person across a room. The zoom level increases significantly, eventually showing a high-detail close-up of the subject's face and eyewear.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有趣思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Subtitle]: 大家好我是Tim哥. [Variety]: Vivo X300 Pro. (2) [Subtitle]: 已經拿到了. [Variety]: Vivo X300 Pro. (3) [Subtitle]: 我們這次發表的手機. (4) [Subtitle]: 我們先快速開箱來看看. [Variety]: 到底有什麼東西. (5) [Subtitle]: 第一個這個是手機的本體 全新的. (6) [Subtitle]: 但我們拿到的是大陸版本 還不是我們台灣的版本. (7) [Subtitle]: 但是還是可以快速給大家看 我們撕開它. (8) [Subtitle]: 大家都要有那種open撕開的聲音. [Variety]: 好撕開它了. (9) [Subtitle]: 有沒有看到. (10) [Subtitle]: 那我們來盒裝現在是開箱嘛 看有什麼東西打開. [Variety]: 看有什麼東西打開. (11) [Subtitle]: 哎呦 一樣有充電線 插頭 還有一個專屬的殼. [Variety]: 一樣有線、插頭. (12) [Subtitle]: 剩下的來看我們的長片吧. (13) [Subtitle]: 來各位 這就是增距鏡. [Variety]: 這就是增距鏡. (14) [Subtitle]: 你可以看到有沒有看 裝上去 超長的. [Variety]: 你可以看到有沒有看裝上去 超長的. (15) [Subtitle]: 那我比一下 我用我的食指. (16) [Subtitle]: 比我食指還長. [Variety]: 比我食指還長. (17) [Subtitle]: 所以它拍起來其實蠻厲害的 尤其是在拍演唱會的時候. (18) [Subtitle]: 那我們現在用人像增距鏡 我們來變焦. [Variety]: 用人像增距鏡. (19) [Subtitle]: 哎呦 阿輝 我們就把它拉到最底. [Variety]: 阿輝. [Variety]: 我們把它拉到最底. (20) [Subtitle]: 你看那個眼鏡那邊 超清楚的. [Variety]: 你看那個眼鏡那邊 超清楚的.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim), 1 female passer-by in background, 1 male subject (A-Hui) for camera test, 1 other person blurred in background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult male wearing a light blue t-shirt, a grey flat cap, and thick-rimmed glasses. He wears a wooden bead bracelet on his right wrist and a yellow smartwatch on his left.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor hotel-style room with warm lighting and a geometric patterned purple/gold carpet. A large glass window in the background looks out onto a city with high-rise buildings. Later scenes show a meeting room table with various attendees.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a male voice speaking enthusiastically at a fast-to-moderate pace. There is a low-level indoor background hum. (2) A distinct, sharp tearing sound occurs as a sticker is peeled, followed by the sound of cardboard sliding. (3) The male speaker continues his narration, describing the phone features with high pitch variability and energetic inflection. (4) Background chatter from a small crowd becomes faintly audible during the later segment. (5) A subtle 'whoosh' transition sound is used between scene cuts. (6) The final section features the same male voice sounding impressed and amazed while demonstrating camera zoom features.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Unboxing -> Accessory Demo -> Feature Test
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a first-look unboxing of the Vivo X300 Pro smartphone and showcase its specialized telephoto lens accessories and impressive optical zoom performance.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on a specific new smartphone model, showing the brand logo clearly and demonstrating its features as a primary review.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy tech unboxing tailored for social media with heavy text overlays and quick cuts.
